info.title: Transmission RPC API
info.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 API for Transmission BitTorrent client. This specification covers all RPC methods available in Transmission 4.1.0+ (RPC version 18).

servers.name: Default Transmission RPC
servers.description: Local Transmission daemon RPC endpoint (configurable via settings)

methods.name: torrent-start
methods.description: Start one or more torrents. If no IDs provided, starts all torrents.

params.name: ids
params.description: Torrent identifiers. Omit to affect all torrents.

methods.name: torrent-start-now
methods.description: Start torrents immediately, bypassing queue order.

params.name: ids
params.description: Torrent identifiers. Omit to affect all torrents.

methods.name: torrent-stop
methods.description: Stop one or more torrents. If no IDs provided, stops all torrents.

params.name: ids
params.description: Torrent identifiers. Omit to affect all torrents.

methods.name: torrent-verify
methods.description: Verify local data integrity for one or more torrents.

params.name: ids
params.description: Torrent identifiers. Omit to affect all torrents.

methods.name: torrent-reannounce
methods.description: Immediately announce torrents to their trackers.

params.name: ids
params.description: Torrent identifiers. Omit to affect all torrents.

methods.name: torrent-set
methods.description: Set properties for one or more torrents. Only provided fields will be changed.

params.name: files-unwanted
params.description: Array of file indices to mark as unwanted

params.name: files-wanted
params.description: Array of file indices to mark as wanted

params.name: priority-high
params.description: File indices to set high priority

params.name: priority-low
params.description: File indices to set low priority

params.name: priority-normal
params.description: File indices to set normal priority

methods.name: torrent-get
methods.description: Retrieve information about one or more torrents. Use 'recently-active' to get torrents active since last call.

params.name: ids
params.description: Torrent identifiers. Use 'recently-active' for recent activity. Omit for all torrents.

params.name: fields
params.description: Array of field names to retrieve (see TorrentFields schema for available fields)

methods.name: torrent-add
methods.description: Add a new torrent from file path, URL, or metainfo (base64-encoded .torrent content).

params.name: filename
params.description: Torrent file path or magnet/URL (required if metainfo not provided)

params.name: metainfo
params.description: Base64-encoded .torrent file content (required if filename not provided)

params.name: cookies
params.description: HTTP cookies for URL downloads (format: NAME=CONTENTS)

result.name: torrent-added-result
result.description: Information about added or duplicate torrent

methods.name: torrent-remove
methods.description: Remove one or more torrents from Transmission, optionally deleting local data.

methods.name: torrent-set-location
methods.description: Move torrent data to a new location or update the download directory path.

params.name: move
params.description: Move files (true) or just update path (false)

methods.name: torrent-rename-path
methods.description: Rename a file or directory within a torrent. Only one torrent can be processed at a time.

methods.name: session-set
methods.description: Modify Transmission session settings. Only provided fields will be changed.

params.name: alt-speed-down
params.description: Alternate download speed limit in kB/s

params.name: alt-speed-time-begin
params.description: Start time for alternate speeds (minutes since midnight)

params.name: alt-speed-time-day
params.description: Days for alternate speeds (bitfield: Sun=1, Mon=2, Tue=4, etc.)

params.name: alt-speed-time-end
params.description: End time for alternate speeds (minutes since midnight)

params.name: alt-speed-up
params.description: Alternate upload speed limit in kB/s

params.name: incomplete-dir-enabled
params.description: Use separate directory for incomplete files

params.name: queue-stalled-minutes
params.description: Minutes before torrent is considered stalled

params.name: trash-original-torrent-files
params.description: Delete original torrent files after adding

methods.name: session-get
methods.description: Retrieve current session settings and information. If fields parameter is omitted, all fields are returned.

params.name: fields
params.description: Specific fields to retrieve. Omit for all fields.

methods.name: session-stats
methods.description: Retrieve transfer statistics for current and cumulative sessions.

methods.name: blocklist-update
methods.description: Download and apply the latest IP blocklist from configured URL.

methods.name: port-test
methods.description: Test whether the peer port is accessible from the internet.

params.name: ip_protocol
params.description: IP protocol to test (ipv4 or ipv6)

methods.name: session-close
methods.description: Gracefully shutdown the Transmission daemon.

methods.name: queue-move-top
methods.summary: Move torrents to top of queue
methods.description: Move one or more torrents to the top of the queue.

methods.name: queue-move-up
methods.description: Move one or more torrents up one position in the queue.

methods.name: queue-move-down
methods.description: Move one or more torrents down one position in the queue.

methods.name: queue-move-bottom
methods.summary: Move torrents to bottom of queue
methods.description: Move one or more torrents to the bottom of the queue.

methods.name: free-space
methods.description: Check available free space in a directory.

methods.name: group-set
methods.description: Create or modify a bandwidth group configuration.

methods.name: group-get
methods.description: Retrieve information about one or more bandwidth groups. Omit group parameter for all groups.

params.name: group
params.description: Group name or array of names. Omit for all groups.

oneOf.description: Special value for recently active torrents

TorrentIds.description: Torrent identifiers: numeric IDs, hash strings, or 'recently-active'

TorrentObject.description: Complete torrent object with all available fields

TorrentAddResult.description: Result contains either torrent-added or torrent-duplicate

speed-units.description: Speed unit labels [KB/s, MB/s, GB/s, TB/s]
